title: Users should not use internal APIs
description: Users should not use internal APIsAnalyze your codeadaptability-modularmaintainabilityCode SmellgradleWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?The public API of a framework, plugin, or library is the way its provider intended it to be used. API stability and compatibility (within the same major version number) of a library are guaranteed only for its public API.Internal APIs are mere implementation details and are prone to breaking changes as the implementation of the library changes. No guarantees are being made about them.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Avoid using internal APIs with double underscore and uppercase (e.g., obj.__INTERNAL_API).
Avoid using internal APIs that start with underscore (e.g., obj._privateMethod()).
Avoid importing from 'internal/' modules which are not part of the public API.
Avoid importing from 'internal/' modules which are not part of the public API.
